prompts.input: Paper-Title: 'DevOps Governance Frameworks'. PDF-Text: 'Governance frameworks ensure DevOps compliance across distributed teams. This requires clear policy definition and shared accountability...' Extrahiere 2 verbatime Zitate, max 25 Woerter.
